# Game Creator AI — Full Content for AI Ingestion

> Game Creator AI is a free, browser-based platform that lets users generate unlimited games using AI. It offers two separate web apps: one for educational learning games (Game Creator Learn) and one for entertainment game prototyping (Game Creator AI). Both support bring-your-own-API (BYOK) or local model execution. No installation, no signup, no cost.

---

## Overview

Game Creator AI is a hub page that links to two AI-powered game generator web apps. The platform is built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no frameworks, no build tools, no backend. Both apps run entirely client-side in the browser and are hosted on Netlify.

**Domain:** https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app

---

## App 1: Game Creator Learn

**URL:** https://aigamecreatorlearn.netlify.app/

**Category:** Educational

**Description:** Create learning games with built-in lesson structure, quizzes, and classroom-ready themes. Perfect for teachers, tutors, and students.

**Key features:**
- Build learning games in maths, science, language, and more
- Built-in lesson structure with quiz generation
- Classroom-ready themes and formatting
- Fast prompt-driven generation with educational focus
- Free to use ($0)

**Who it's for:** Teachers, tutors, students, homeschooling parents, educational content creators.

**How to use:**
1. Open https://aigamecreatorlearn.netlify.app/ in any modern browser
2. Enter your API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) or connect a local model (Ollama, LM Studio)
3. Describe the learning game you want (subject, topic, age group, difficulty)
4. The AI generates a complete educational game with lesson structure and quizzes

---

## App 2: Game Creator AI

**URL:** https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/

**Category:** Entertainment / Fun

**Description:** Generate creative game ideas, mechanics, and full prompt specs for entertainment and rapid prototyping. Build arcade, platformer, shooter, strategy and more.

**Key features:**
- Build arcade, platformer, shooter, strategy, and other game types
- Fine-tune tone, art style, and gameplay mechanics
- Prompt-driven game spec generation
- Use your own API or run locally for custom workflows
- Free to use ($0)

**Who it's for:** Indie game developers, hobbyists, game jam participants, rapid prototypers, creative writers.

**How to use:**
1. Open https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/ in any modern browser
2. Enter your API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) or connect a local model (Ollama, LM Studio)
3. Describe the game you want to create (genre, style, mechanics, tone)
4. The AI generates a complete game spec with mechanics, art direction, and prompt details

---

## Platform Features

### Unlimited Games
Generate unlimited game concepts, full prompts, and production-ready requirements with a single click. No caps, no quotas, no daily limits.

### API Friendly
Connect your own API, adapt to local models, and use the exact flow that matches your creative pipeline. Supported providers:
- OpenAI (GPT models)
- Anthropic (Claude models)
- Google (Gemini models)
- Ollama (local models, runs offline)
- LM Studio (local models, runs offline)
- Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints

### Ready to Launch
Both sites are live and easy to use. Just choose your project and start generating. No installation, no signup, no account required.

---

## Pricing

Both apps are free to use. Price: $0 USD.

An optional Tip Jar is available for users who wish to support ongoing development: https://buy.stripe.com/5kQ9AVgCY5dJ77TbIA9R600

---

## Technical Details

- **Tech stack:** Vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript — no frameworks, no build tools
- **Hosting:** Netlify static hosting
- **Backend:** None — both apps run entirely client-side
- **Database:** None — no user data is stored server-side
- **User accounts:** None — no signup or login required
- **API keys:** Stored locally in the browser (localStorage), never transmitted to any server except the chosen AI provider
- **Privacy:** No tracking, no analytics, no cookies beyond what the browser natively uses

---

## AI Agent Discovery Files

This site provides the following files for AI agent discovery and comprehension:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/llms.txt` | Curated site summary for AI models |
| `/llms-full.txt` | This file — full-text content for deep ingestion |
| `/robots.txt` | Crawler directives (AI crawlers explicitly allowed) |
| `/sitemap.xml` | XML sitemap with lastmod dates |
| `/sitemap.md` | Markdown sitemap for agent scanning |
| `/AGENTS.md` | Instructions for coding agents (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) |
| `/brand.txt` | Brand identity and naming rules |
| `/ai.json` | Structured content map and AI permissions |
| `/ai.txt` | AI permissions declaration |
| `/.well-known/ai-plugin.json` | ChatGPT plugin manifest |
| `/.well-known/agents.json` | A2A agent discovery (Google protocol) |
| `/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json` | Agent Skills Discovery index |

---

## AI Permissions

- **Training:** Allowed — AI systems may use this content for model training
- **Search:** Allowed — AI systems may index and return this content in search results
- **Citation:** Allowed — AI systems may cite and quote this content with attribution
- **Indexing:** Allowed — AI crawlers may index all pages
